name: Colourblind
author: Poki
description: Bring colour back into the world in Colourblind! In this puzzle platformer, you play as an eyeball who's friend has been kidnapped by an evil pirate cloud. With their friend lost, all colour has gone away in the world - and it's up to our hero to fix it! As you make your way through the levels, you'll encounter totems where you get a single colour back. This will unlock new platforms in the world and can show you new ways to go! Be careful though, running through a waterfall will reset the colours and will remove the platforms again. Can you save your friend, restore the world and defeat the pirate cloud? How to play Colourblind? Use A and D or the left and right arrow key to move! Use spacebar or the up arrow key to jump! Who created Colourblind? Colourblind is created by Nitrome. Play their other games on Poki: Chick Flick , Sandman and Gunbrick How can I play Colourblind for free? You can play Colourblind for free on Poki. Can I play Colourblind on mobile devices and desktop? Colourblind can be played on your computer only.
